children.text: High in the mist-shrouded peaks of Rokugan lies

, an ancient mountain shrine once dedicated to the benevolent mountain kami. Centuries ago, an Oni siege shattered its sanctity, corrupting the shrine’s wards and trapping a humble monk—Akio—in spiritual limbo. Legends tell of a shattered Spirit Mirror that must be restored to cleanse the shrine’s heart and free the lost soul within.

A linear progression of five chambers winding inward. From the overgrown gatehouse, through a hall of whispering statues, into a hidden tea room, across a narrow ronin-patrolled corridor, and finally to the inner sanctum atop a raised altar.
Enter and traverse the corrupted shrine.
Solve the Oni-script puzzle to unlock the inner gate.
Defeat the ronin guardians and the Oni Spirit boss.
Restore the Spirit Mirror to cleanse the shrine.
Rescue Monk Akio from spiritual imprisonment.
A moss-slick torii stands half-buried in ivy. Carved Oni faces leer from broken stone pillars. Chill mountain air seeps through cracks, carrying distant, mournful whispers.
Gain entry past the perimeter traps and clear the gatehouse.
Once bright vermilion, now streaked with lichen.
Faces twisted in silent screams, six in total.
Dexterity DC 12 to navigate without noise.
Hidden in the base of each Oni pillar, a spring-loaded mechanism hurls razor-edged shuriken when triggered. Disable with Thieves’ Tools (DC 14) or take damage.
As you step onto a worn stone slab before a pillar, a faint click echoes from within the pillar’s carvings.
DC 14 Dexterity (Thieves’ Tools): Disarm the shuriken spring mechanism safely.:
Success: No trap triggers. Failure: Trigger the trap.
Each triggered pillar sprays shuriken at a target creature within 10 ft. Each creature must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity save or take 2d4 piercing damage.
Twelve stone statues line a vaulted hall, their eyes inlaid with faintly glowing jade. Each statue’s mouth seems poised to speak, and a carved plaque bears an inscrutable Oni-script verse.
Solve the Oni-script puzzle to open the inner gate.
Each statue holds an animal-themed mask.
Oni script verse hints at facing east at dawn.
Sealed by runes; slides aside if the puzzle is solved.
The jade eyes of the statues flicker as you study the plaque. The verse reads: “When the beast greets the dawn, the door shall yaw.”
A puzzle that, when solved, aligns the statues’ masks to face the rising sun, unlocking the gate. Reward: safe passage and morale boost.
Examine the masks for elemental symbols.
Listen: a faint breeze comes from the eastern wall.
Rotate each statue so that the mask representing the eastern animals (dragon, crane, koi) face the eastern niche.
Align statues in groups of three by element: water (koi), air (crane), earth (turtle) toward east.
Press the easternmost statue’s footplate simultaneously.
A gust of spiritual wind slams the gate, dealing each creature 1d6 bludgeoning damage and resetting the puzzle.
Low tables with cracked lacquer surfaces stand on tatami mats. A single scroll chest sits against the far wall, its lid slightly ajar. A faint scent of tea lingers amid stale air.
Locate and open the hidden passage beneath the scroll chest.
Sound travels—Stealth DC 13 to move silently.
Can be searched for hidden compartments (Investigation DC 12).
Contains a mechanical latch and possible trap.
Grey-furred rats the size of a large dog, eyes glowing faint orange.
Corrupted by shrine incense, these giant rats grew bold and gnaw at sacred wood.
Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d6 + 2 piercing damage.
The scroll chest’s latch conceals a poisoned needle. A failed disarm injects toxin.
A tiny pin jutting from the latch of the scroll chest gleams ominously.
DC 15 Dexterity (Thieves’ Tools): Remove the needle without triggering it.:
Success: You open the chest safely. Failure: Needle pricks you.
On a failure, target takes 1d4 piercing damage and must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution save or be poisoned (disadvantage on attacks and saves) for 1 minute.
Paper lanterns cast flickering shadows along a narrow corridor. Scattered katanas and fallen banners hint at a fierce last stand. Silent figures lurk just beyond the light.
Overcome the ronin ambush and press onward.
Two-square wide corridor. Difficult terrain during combat rules apply.
Darkness beyond lantern radius of 20 ft.
Display the crest of a dishonored samurai clan.
Medium Humanoid (Human), Chaotic neutral • Blade of Fallen Honor
Scars mar his face; wears mismatched armor and a jagged nodachi.
Once a samurai, now a ruthless bandit leader seeking refuge and loot.
The captain makes two melee attacks.
Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 1d12+4 slashing damage.
When a creature misses him with a melee attack, he uses his reaction to make one nodachi attack.
Medium Humanoid (Human), Chaotic neutral • Rogue Warrior
Leather armor, mismatched weapons, eyes darting.
Followers of the Bandit Captain, scavenging in the mountains.
Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d6+2 slashing damage.
A domed chamber with a cracked altar at its center. Fragments of a broken mirror scatter the floor. A swirling purple haze coalesces into a horned Oni Spirit. The atmosphere hums with dark energy.
Defeat the Oni Spirit, restore the Spirit Mirror, and free Monk Akio.
Grooves suggest where mirror fragments fit.
Five shards scattered around the room.
Purple haze crackles, dealing 1d6 necrotic damage to anyone starting their turn within 5 ft.
Large Fiend (Spiritual), Chaotic evil • Tormentor of Souls
Translucent horned fiend, glowing eyes, robed in spectral tatters.
A vengeful Oni fused with corrupted shrine energy, seeking to trap mortal souls for eternity.
Understands Common and Abyssal but cannot speak.
Any creature that starts its turn within 10 ft. of the Oni Spirit must succeed on DC 15 Wisdom save or be frightened until end of its next turn.
The Oni Spirit makes two attacks: one with its Claw and one with its Ethereal Flame.
Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 2d6+4 slashing damage.
Ranged Spell Attack: +8 to hit, range 30 ft., one target. Hit: 3d6 necrotic damage.
The Oni Spirit emits a mournful wail. Each creature within 20 ft. must succeed on DC 15 Constitution save or take 2d6 psychic damage and be stunned until end of its next turn.
The Oni Spirit attempts to pull one Medium or smaller creature within 30 ft. into its aura. Target must succeed on DC 15 Strength save or be pulled 20 ft. and restrained until end of its next turn.
A +1 wondrous item. Grants advantage on Wisdom (Insight) checks while attuned.
